issuerCanonicalName: HK Hospital Authority — FDH Free-Care Eligibility

humanReadable.title: Hong Kong Public Hospital — FDH Free Care Eligibility
humanReadable.description: Confirms a foreign domestic worker holds a currently-active FDH visa and a valid HKID, qualifying for HK public-hospital free-care rates (HK$180 A&E, HK$120 specialist) instead of non-eligible rates (HK$1,230 A&E, obstetric $39k–$90k). Eligibility is binary per Hospital Authority's existing algorithmic check; once the contract terminates, visa shifts to 'visitor' and full non-resident fees apply.
humanReadable.issuingOrg: Hong Kong Hospital Authority (existing automated eligibility check)

_note: Largest minAnonymitySet (1000) — HK has 368,000 FDHs as of 2024 LegCo Research Office report, so the eligibility set is large. This is the cleanest policy to demo: clear binary check, large k-anonymity set, immediate emotional impact (the rate disparity).
